title: auth.issue_login_grant
description: Mint a single-use, 15-minute login grant token bound to an email (workspaces-org-program §B3). The holder exchanges it for a JWT session at POST /grant/exchange/ (gated by AUTH_LOGIN_GRANT). With create_if_missing the exchange creates a verified email account (auth_type=email, unusable password) when none exists. Returns {grant_token}.

email.description: Email address the grant is bound to (case-insensitive).

verified_email.description: Whether the issuer has proven mailbox ownership (e.g. the invite email was delivered there). Sets is_email_verified on a created account. Default true.

create_if_missing.description: Create a user (auth_type=email, unusable password) on exchange when no account exists for the email. Default false.

language.description: Optional UI language hint for a created account, forwarded on the user.registered event for downstream consumers (e.g. profiles).
